stories.name: server-dispatch-and-rust-command
stories.title: Wire GET_IMAGE_LIST server dispatch and Rust command
stories.description: Add GET_IMAGE_LIST dispatch branch in IPCServer._handle_message (server.py) and add get_image_list Tauri command in commands.rs. Register the command in main.rs. The Python handler already exists (handle_get_image_list in handler.py) - only the server dispatch and Rust layer are missing.
stories.notes: Follow skip_image pattern for Rust command. No payload needed.

stories.name: frontend-image-list-handling
stories.title: Frontend image_list event handler and recovery invocation
stories.description: Add case 'image_list' in handleMessage switch in main.ts to rebuild imageList from ImageListPayload. Add recovery invocation: after first non-loading state_changed event, if imageList.length === 0, invoke get_image_list once (guarded by recoveryAttempted flag). ImageListPayload type already exists in types.ts.
stories.notes: Filter deleted entries. Rebuild imageList entirely. Use convertFileSrc for blobUrl. Set currentIndex to last entry or -1.

dependency_notes: Stories are independent. Story 01 is backend/Rust, Story 02 is frontend.
